title: Krylix
description: A modern, feature-rich kill feed HUD mod that displays player kills with style, animations, and kill streak tracking!
body:
# Krylix - Advanced Kill Feed Mod ## 🎯 What is Krylix? Krylix is a client-side kill feed mod that brings modern FPS-style kill notifications to Minecraft. See every kill in real-time with player/mob heads, weapon icons, health display, and epic kill streak announcements! Perfect for: - 🗡️ **PvP Servers** - Track kills in real-time - 🏰 **Survival Servers** - Monitor mob kills - 🎮 **Content Creators** - Add professional kill feed to streams - 🎯 **Practice Servers** - Track your performance --- ## ✨ Key Features ### 📊 Kill Feed Display - **Real Player Skins** - Shows actual player heads with correct textures - **30+ Mob Heads** - All hostile mobs with proper rendering - **Animated Weapons** - Smooth bobbing animation for weapon icons - **Health Display** - See killer's remaining HP - **Distance Tracking** - Records kill distance - **15-Second Display** - Entries fade out smoothly - **Top-Right Position** - Clean, non-intrusive placement ### 🔥 Kill Streak System Track consecutive kills with epic announcements: | Kills | Streak Name | Sound | |-------|-------------|-------| | 2 | **DOUBLE KILL!** | 🔊 Level Up | | 3 | **TRIPLE KILL!** | 🔊 Level Up+ | | 4 | **MEGA KILL!** | 🔊 Level Up++ | | 5 | **ULTRA KILL!** | 🔊 Level Up+++ | | 6 | **MONSTER KILL!** | 🔊 Level Up++++ | | 7 | **RAMPAGE!** | 🔊 Level Up+++++ | | 8+ | **GODLIKE!** | 🔊 Level Up++++++ | - ⏱️ **10-second window** to continue streak - 💬 **Golden text** announcement in chat - 🔊 **Unique sounds** with increasing pitch ### 🎨 Visual Effects - ✨ Smooth weapon bobbing animation - 🌊 Fade-out transition - 🎨 Color-coded killers and victims - 📍 Dynamic positioning for multiple entries - 🚫 No background - clean minimalist design ### 🎮 Supported Mobs **30+ mob textures** including: - Zombie, Skeleton, Creeper, Spider, Enderman - Piglin, Zombified Piglin, Wither Skeleton, Stray, Husk, Drowned - Blaze, Ghast, Witch, Phantom, Vex - Guardian, Elder Guardian, Shulker - Silverfish, Endermite, Cave Spider - Ravager, Pillager, Vindicator, Evoker - Wither, Ender Dragon - And more! --- ## 📋 Requirements - **Minecraft**: 1.20.1 - **Mod Loader**: Forge 47.1.0+ - **Java**: 17 or higher - **Dependencies**: KotlinForForge 4.3.0 (bundled) - **Side**: Client-side only --- ## 🎮 Commands All commands require OP permission: - `/testkill` - Generate random test kill - `/testkill sword` - Test sword kill - `/testkill bow` - Test bow kill - `/testkill axe` - Test axe kill - `/testkill headshot` - Test headshot kill - `/testkill multi` - Generate 5 test kills Use these commands to test the kill feed and see kill streaks in action! --- ## 🚀 Installation 1. **Download** the latest version from Modrinth 2. **Install Forge** 1.20.1-47.1.0 if not present 3. **Place JAR** in `.minecraft/mods/` folder 4. **Launch** Minecraft with Forge profile 5. **Enjoy!** Kill feed will appear automatically --- ## 🎨 Screenshots ### Kill Feed in Action See player kills with heads, weapons, and health display ### Kill Streak System Epic announcements for consecutive kills ### Mob Support 30+ mob textures rendered correctly --- ## ⚙️ Configuration Currently, Krylix works out of the box with no configuration needed! **Planned features:** - Position customization - Color themes - Toggle individual elements - Custom kill streak messages --- ## 📄 License This mod is licensed under the MIT License. --- ## 🙏 Credits - **Developer**: eliasnvx - **Built with**: KotlinForForge - **Inspired by**: Classic FPS kill feed systems (Quake, Unreal Tournament, Call of Duty) ---
**⭐ Enjoying Krylix? Leave a review and star on Modrinth!** Made with ❤️ for the Minecraft PvP community
